skyblocklens.config.title: SkyBlock Lens Settings
skyblocklens.config.reset_confirm.title: Reset all settings?
skyblocklens.config.reset_confirm.desc: This will restore SkyBlock Lens settings to defaults and save the config file.
skyblocklens.config.only_skyblock: Only show SkyBlock features on Hypixel SkyBlock
skyblocklens.category_desc.about: Core controls, language, and visual theme.
skyblocklens.category_desc.misc: Nameplates, local privacy, and other visual controls.
skyblocklens.category_desc.gui_locations: HUD module positions and preview behavior.
skyblocklens.category_desc.notifications: Chat highlights and local visual alerts.
skyblocklens.category_desc.item_list: Local item browser, recipes, and search.
skyblocklens.category_desc.toolbar: NEU-style local toolbar with search, settings, and item browser shortcuts.
skyblocklens.category_desc.inventory_but: Safe client-side shortcuts in inventory screens.
skyblocklens.category_desc.slot_locking: Local slot protection, keybind, sound, reset, and overlay color.
skyblocklens.category_desc.quick_swap: Shift-click swapping for explicitly linked inventory and hotbar slots.
skyblocklens.category_desc.tooltip_tweak: Local tooltip data appended to supported items.
skyblocklens.setting.core.enabled.title: Enable SkyBlock Lens
skyblocklens.setting.core.enabled.desc: Master switch for every client-side SkyBlock Lens feature.
Hide SkyBlock HUD, tooltips, toolbar buttons, item buttons, and chat alerts outside Hypixel SkyBlock.
skyblocklens.setting.core.language.title: Language
skyblocklens.setting.core.language.desc: Switch the settings interface between English and Russian.
Resize the SkyBlock Lens settings layout.
skyblocklens.setting.core.accent_color.d: Choose the main highlight color used by SkyBlock Lens UI.
skyblocklens.setting.about.version.title: Version
skyblocklens.setting.about.version.desc: Modern Fabric rewrite target for Minecraft 1.21.x clients.
skyblocklens.setting.about.safe_mode.des: No macros, packet abuse, automation, or anti-cheat bypass features.
skyblocklens.setting.about.open_source.d: Feature work is designed for public review and transparent rules.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.copy_item_name: Add a safe client-side helper for copying visible item names.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.compact_toolti: Reduce repeated local tooltip lines while keeping important data.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.search_shortcu: Remember common search fields and open them faster.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.hide_empty_lor: Clean up empty visual lines in supported SkyBlock tooltips.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.remember_last_: Return to the last opened SkyBlock Lens menu section.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.nameplates.ena: Enables local visual controls for player and NPC nameplates.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.nameplates.sho: Allows the local player nameplate to render above your own head in supported camera views.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.nameplates_own: Locally changes the visible name above your own head and in your nameplate.
Choose the local color for your replaced or original own name.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.nameplates_bac: Chooses the configured nameplate background color.
Controls the configured nameplate background transparency.
skyblocklens.setting.misc.nameplates_tex: Chooses the configured nameplate text color.
Controls the configured nameplate text transparency.
skyblocklens.setting.hud.open_editor.des: Open the draggable overlay editor for HUD modules.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.open_editor: Move and resize the inventory search toolbar near the hotbar.
skyblocklens.setting.hud.scale.title: HUD Scale
skyblocklens.setting.hud.scale.desc: Resize all SkyBlock Lens HUD modules.
skyblocklens.setting.gui.hud_background_: Choose the HUD module background color.
skyblocklens.setting.gui.scoreboard_back: Choose the background color for the vanilla right-side scoreboard.
skyblocklens.setting.gui.snap_to_edges.d: Keep HUD modules aligned when moving them around.
skyblocklens.setting.gui.show_anchor_gri: Show alignment guides inside the HUD editor.
skyblocklens.setting.gui.lock_layout.des: Prevent accidental movement of finished HUD layouts.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.chat_: Hide configured chat lines without sending automatic messages.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.edit_: Add or remove local chat terms hidden by Chat Filters.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.chat_: Highlight important SkyBlock drops and completion messages.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.edit_: Add or remove local chat terms highlighted by Chat Highlights.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.rare_: Show a visual alert when a rare drop line is detected.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.speci: Highlight special zealot messages from visible chat.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.dunge: Show score-related dungeon chat messages more clearly.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.marke: Highlight visible auction and Bazaar completion messages.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.durat: Control how long local notifications stay on screen.
skyblocklens.setting.notifications.coold: Show a local reminder when a tracked cooldown is ready.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.open_brows: Open the bundled local SkyBlock item browser.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.local_brow: Enable browsing of bundled item and recipe data.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.browser_ov: Show the right-side SkyBlock item grid in inventory and container screens.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.toggle_bro: Toggle the right-side item browser panel without opening settings.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.hide_in_du: Disable the search bar and item browser while in SkyBlock dungeons.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.overlay_wh: Open the item browser overlay automatically while typing in the toolbar search.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.inventory_: Choose the highlight color used by inventory and chest search.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.recipe_vie: Show local recipe data where it is bundled with the mod.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.usage_view: Show bundled recipes that use the selected item as an ingredient.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.search_ali: Search item names, ids, and known aliases.
skyblocklens.setting.itemlist.hide_missi: Keep unfinished local data from cluttering item views.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.enable.desc: Show a compact SkyBlock Lens toolbar in supported screens.
Show a SkyBlock-aware item search field below handled inventory screens.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.inventory_s: Show a button that highlights slots matching the toolbar search text.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.ctrl_f.desc: Focus the toolbar search field from handled inventory screens with CTRL+F.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.auto_turnof: Disable inventory search highlighting after two minutes without toolbar input.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.search_widt: Resize the toolbar search field width.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.search_heig: Resize the toolbar search field height.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.item_search: Add a button for opening the local item search.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.recipe_butt: Add a button for jumping to recipe information.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.profile_but: Add a button reserved for the profile viewer.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.favorite_it: Show favorite item shortcuts in the toolbar.
skyblocklens.setting.toolbar.clear_searc: Add a quick button to clear supported search fields.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.e: Show safe client-side shortcuts in supported inventories.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.o: Edit inventory button positions, sizes, labels, commands, icons, and colors.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.i: Add a safe button that opens the local item browser.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.b: Choose the built-in inventory button background color.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.c: Choose the default background for quick command buttons.
Control default quick command button transparency.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.s: Reserve a shortcut for the Storage GUI.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.w: Reserve a shortcut for wardrobe-related views.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.p: Reserve a shortcut for pet overlay and profile data.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.t: Reserve a shortcut for trade helpers.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.c: Reserve a shortcut for event calendar views.
skyblocklens.setting.inventory_buttons.s: Reserve a shortcut for future sacks-related UI.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.enable: Track protected slots locally and warn before risky moves.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.bindin: Hold the key on an inventory slot, then hover a hotbar slot to create a local link.
skyblocklens.setting.quick_swap.enable.d: When a main inventory slot is linked to a hotbar slot, Shift+Left Click swaps them with one vanilla swap action.
Allow links between inventory and hotbar slots without locking the items.
Key to hold while creating a quick-swap link.
Draw a small marker on linked slots.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.bindin: Treat bound slots as protected slots for drop and inventory click blocking.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.keybin: Set the key used to lock or unlock the hovered inventory slot.
Play a local ding when locking or unlocking slots.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.sound_: Set the volume of the local lock and unlock ding.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.lock_s: Prevent locked inventory slots from being moved inside detected trade windows.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.disabl: Disable lock overlays and lock blocking inside detected Storage and Backpack screens.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.open_k: Open Minecraft keybinds to change the key used to lock hovered slots.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.hotbar: Allow hotbar slots to be marked as protected.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.invent: Allow normal inventory slots to be marked as protected.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.warnin: Show a local warning when a protected slot is touched.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.overla: Draw a small visual marker on protected slots.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.allow_: Permit shift-click actions even when visual locking is enabled.
skyblocklens.setting.slot_locking.overla: Choose the color used to mark locked inventory slots.
Clear every locally saved locked slot.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.enha: Append bundled SkyBlock item data to supported tooltips.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.inte: Show the bundled SkyBlock Lens item id in supported tooltips.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.rari: Show local rarity metadata when the bundled item data includes it.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.cate: Show local item category metadata when available.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.pet_: Show the full visible pet XP requirement when the tooltip contains abbreviated pet XP.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.pric: Reserve tooltip space for opt-in market data.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.muse: Show local museum donation hints when data exists.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.pet_: Add pet level and item details to supported pet tooltips.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.dung: Highlight dungeon quality and star information.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.ench: Make important enchantment lines easier to scan.
skyblocklens.setting.tooltip_tweaks.miss: Show when local recipe data is unavailable.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.coold: Show tracked ability cooldowns as durability-style bars.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.treec: Show a visual cooldown overlay for Treecapitator-style items.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.build: Display local builder wand usage information.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.block: Display local block zapper cooldown and charge hints.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.ether: Show visual information for Etherwarp-capable items.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.bonem: Reserve overlay support for Bonemerang cooldown tracking.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.farmi: Show farming tool counters and visual local data.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.grapp: Show a local cooldown indicator for grappling hook usage.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.minio: Display a visual radius helper for minion crystals.
skyblocklens.setting.item_overlays.withe: Reserve a visual-only indicator for Wither Cloak state.
skyblocklens.setting.skill_overlays.farm: Show farming progress and tool status overlays.
skyblocklens.setting.skill_overlays.mini: Show mining progress, commissions, and powder hints.
skyblocklens.setting.skill_overlays.fish: Show fishing timers and sea creature information.
skyblocklens.setting.skill_overlays.fora: Reserve overlay support for foraging counters.
skyblocklens.setting.skill_overlays.ench: Show enchanting activity and experiment status.
skyblocklens.setting.skill_overlays.alch: Reserve overlay support for alchemy progress.
skyblocklens.setting.skill_overlays.tool: Warn when a skill overlay needs a matching tool type.
skyblocklens.setting.todo_overlays.daily: Show a local checklist for daily SkyBlock activities.
skyblocklens.setting.todo_overlays.fetch: Reserve a reminder slot for Fetchur tasks.
skyblocklens.setting.todo_overlays.commi: Show commission reminders from visible client data.
skyblocklens.setting.todo_overlays.minio: Show reminders for minion collection and storage status.
skyblocklens.setting.todo_overlays.rift_: Reserve a local task list for Rift activities.
skyblocklens.setting.slayer_overlay.boss: Show slayer boss timer information from visible signals.
skyblocklens.setting.slayer_overlay.rng_: Reserve display space for visible RNG meter information.
skyblocklens.setting.slayer_overlay.mini: Highlight miniboss messages from visible chat.
skyblocklens.setting.slayer_overlay.eman: Show a visual warning for beacon-related messages.
skyblocklens.setting.slayer_overlay.blaz: Show visual state hints for blaze slayer mechanics.
skyblocklens.setting.slayer_overlay.vamp: Reserve visual hints for vampire slayer phases.
skyblocklens.setting.storage_gui.custom_: Show a modern client-side storage browsing view.
Search visible storage names and bundled item data.
skyblocklens.setting.storage_gui.pages.d: Add page navigation to the storage view.
skyblocklens.setting.storage_gui.backpac: Preview known backpack contents when safely available.
skyblocklens.setting.storage_gui.ender_c: Include Ender Chest sections in the storage view.
skyblocklens.setting.storage_gui.compact: Use a denser layout for repeated storage browsing.
skyblocklens.setting.dungeons.dungeon_ma: Display a safe client-side map overlay when dungeon data is visible.
skyblocklens.setting.dungeons.score_pane: Show score, secrets, crypts, and time in a compact overlay.
skyblocklens.setting.dungeons.secrets_co: Track visible secrets count during dungeon runs.
skyblocklens.setting.dungeons.crypts_cou: Track visible crypt count during dungeon runs.
skyblocklens.setting.dungeons.profit.des: Reserve reward profit calculations for opt-in price data.
skyblocklens.setting.dungeons.puzzle_inf: Show non-automated puzzle information and reminders.
skyblocklens.setting.enchanting.visual_h: Show visual-only hints without completing actions.
skyblocklens.setting.enchanting.profit_d: Reserve profit data for opt-in market integration.
skyblocklens.setting.enchanting.enchant_: Show a searchable list of local enchant information.
skyblocklens.setting.enchanting.superpai: Track visible card information without clicking for the player.
Show commission status from visible SkyBlock data.
skyblocklens.setting.mining.forge_tracke: Track forge timers from user-visible information.
skyblocklens.setting.mining.crystal_holl: Show local Crystal Hollows waypoint and map helpers.
skyblocklens.setting.mining.powder_track: Track powder gain and visible mining stats.
Show timers for visible mining events.
skyblocklens.setting.mining.drill_fuel.d: Show drill fuel in an overlay where item data is visible.
skyblocklens.setting.fishing.hide_other_: Prepare a local visual option for reducing fishing clutter.
skyblocklens.setting.fishing.incoming_fi: Show a visual warning from visible fishing cues.
skyblocklens.setting.fishing.timer.title: Fishing Timer
skyblocklens.setting.fishing.timer.desc: Show fishing timers and local session data.
skyblocklens.setting.fishing.lava_sea_cr: Highlight lava fishing sea creature information.
skyblocklens.setting.garden.visitor_help: Show local visitor item and progress information.
skyblocklens.setting.garden.composter.de: Track visible composter state and timers.
skyblocklens.setting.garden.contest_time: Show Jacob contest timers and reminders.
skyblocklens.setting.garden.fortune_over: Show farming fortune data when visible.
skyblocklens.setting.garden.plot_names.d: Show saved local names for garden plots.
skyblocklens.setting.improved_sb_menus.p: Improve supported SkyBlock profile menus client-side.
skyblocklens.setting.improved_sb_menus.t: Add search support to local trade views.
skyblocklens.setting.improved_sb_menus.r: Add search support to recipe views.
skyblocklens.setting.improved_sb_menus.b: Preview backpack contents when safely known.
skyblocklens.setting.improved_sb_menus.m: Show safe local buttons in supported SkyBlock menus.
skyblocklens.setting.equipment_hud.enabl: Show armor, equipment, and pet HUD elements.
skyblocklens.setting.equipment_hud.equip: Show necklace, cloak, belt, and glove slots.
skyblocklens.setting.equipment_hud.durab: Show item durability and cooldown-style indicators.
skyblocklens.setting.calendar.overlay.de: Show current and upcoming SkyBlock events.
skyblocklens.setting.calendar.event_noti: Highlight visible event start and end messages.
skyblocklens.setting.calendar.favorite_e: Mark events that should be emphasized.
skyblocklens.setting.trade_menu.value_es: Estimate visible trade value with local or opt-in data.
skyblocklens.setting.trade_menu.item_war: Warn about suspicious or missing visible trade items.
skyblocklens.setting.trade_menu.coin_dif: Show visible coin differences in trade screens.
skyblocklens.setting.trade_menu.confirm_: Show an extra local visual summary before confirming trades.
skyblocklens.setting.pet_overlay.xp_per_: Estimate pet XP gain from local session data.
skyblocklens.setting.pet_overlay.held_it: Show active pet held item when visible.
skyblocklens.setting.pet_overlay.missing: Warn when expected pet data is missing.
skyblocklens.setting.pet_overlay.score.d: Reserve display support for pet score data.
skyblocklens.setting.ah_tweaks.price_too: Reserve auction price tooltip support for opt-in data.
skyblocklens.setting.ah_tweaks.lowest_bi: Show lowest BIN when opt-in market data is available.
skyblocklens.setting.ah_tweaks.undercut_: Warn when visible pricing appears below expected value.
skyblocklens.setting.ah_tweaks.selling_w: Show local checks before listing valuable items.
skyblocklens.setting.bazaar_tweaks.order: Highlight visible Bazaar order fill messages.
skyblocklens.setting.bazaar_tweaks.price: Reserve Bazaar tooltip support for opt-in data.
skyblocklens.setting.bazaar_tweaks.sprea: Show market spread when data is available.
skyblocklens.setting.bazaar_tweaks.craft: Reserve craft profit display for opt-in market data.
skyblocklens.setting.bazaar_tweaks.npc_s: Warn when a Bazaar item may be better sold elsewhere.
skyblocklens.setting.recipe_tweaks.recip: Show local recipe trees for bundled items.
skyblocklens.setting.recipe_tweaks.usage: Show which bundled recipes use an item.
skyblocklens.setting.recipe_tweaks.missi: Highlight recipe ingredients missing from local data.
skyblocklens.setting.recipe_tweaks.compa: Use a denser layout for recipe browsing.
Reserve a graph view for opt-in price history.
skyblocklens.setting.price_graph.local_c: Cache opt-in price data locally when enabled.
skyblocklens.setting.price_graph.trend.d: Show market trend lines in price graphs.
skyblocklens.setting.price_graph.compare: Compare item BIN history when opt-in data exists.
skyblocklens.setting.wardrobe_keybinds.e: Prepare safe keybind handling for wardrobe UI screens.
skyblocklens.setting.wardrobe_keybinds.n: Use number keys inside supported wardrobe screens.
skyblocklens.setting.wardrobe_keybinds.r: Only process wardrobe keybinds while a related screen is open.
skyblocklens.setting.wardrobe_keybinds.s: Play a local sound when a wardrobe keybind is accepted.
skyblocklens.setting.accessory_bag.missi: Show missing accessory hints from local data.
skyblocklens.setting.museum.value_overla: Reserve value display for opt-in market data.
skyblocklens.setting.museum.missing_item: Show museum items missing from local data.
skyblocklens.setting.profile_viewer.skil: Show profile skill panels when data is available.
skyblocklens.setting.profile_viewer.slay: Show profile slayer panels when data is available.
skyblocklens.setting.profile_viewer.dung: Show profile dungeon panels when data is available.
skyblocklens.setting.profile_viewer.coll: Show profile collection panels when data is available.
skyblocklens.setting.profile_viewer.loca: Estimate networth only from local or opt-in data.
skyblocklens.setting.minion_helper.profi: Reserve minion profit display for opt-in price data.
skyblocklens.setting.minion_helper.fuel_: Track visible minion fuel timing information.
skyblocklens.setting.minion_helper.compa: Use a dense minion helper layout.
skyblocklens.setting.minion_helper.colle: Warn when visible minion collection data needs attention.
skyblocklens.setting.minion_helper.stora: Warn when visible minion storage appears full.
skyblocklens.setting.api.enabled.title: Enable API Features
skyblocklens.setting.api.profile.title: Profile API
skyblocklens.setting.api.profile.desc: Allow profile requests only after API features are enabled.
skyblocklens.setting.api.auction.title: Auction API
skyblocklens.setting.api.auction.desc: Allow auction price requests only after API features are enabled.
skyblocklens.setting.api.bazaar.title: Bazaar API
skyblocklens.setting.api.bazaar.desc: Allow Bazaar price requests only after API features are enabled.
skyblocklens.setting.api.rate_limit.desc: Protect Hypixel and the client with strict request limits.
skyblocklens.setting.api.endpoint_docs.d: Every future endpoint must be documented before release.
Checks bundled items, recipes, and language files.
skyblocklens.setting.io_test.config_file: Checks that settings are saved as UTF-8 JSON.
skyblocklens.setting.io_test.render_debu: Show debug visuals for UI layout testing.
skyblocklens.setting.security.no_network: Network access stays disabled unless a feature clearly opts in.
skyblocklens.setting.security.no_automat: The mod must not click, move, farm, mine, fish, or fight for the player.
skyblocklens.setting.security.no_remote_: Remote files must never be executed as code.
skyblocklens.setting.security.guardrails: Keep suspicious behavior blocked by default.
skyblocklens.hud.editor.title: HUD Editor
skyblocklens.hud.editor.hint: Drag modules to move them; pull the corner handle to resize
skyblocklens.inventory_editor.title: Inventory Button Editor
skyblocklens.inventory_editor.hint: Drag buttons around the inventory preview, pull the corner to resize, and choose command icons/colors on the right.
skyblocklens.inventory_editor.label: Label
skyblocklens.items.browser.title: Item Browser
skyblocklens.items.disabled: Local Item Browser is disabled in SkyBlock Lens settings.
skyblocklens.items.recipe_unavailable: No local recipe data for this item.
skyblocklens.items.uses_unavailable: No local usage data for this item.
skyblocklens.chat_terms.filters.title: Chat Filter Terms
skyblocklens.chat_terms.filters.hint: Messages containing these terms are hidden while Chat Filters is enabled.
skyblocklens.chat_terms.highlights.title: Chat Highlight Terms
skyblocklens.chat_terms.highlights.hint: Messages containing these terms are highlighted while Chat Highlights is enabled.
skyblocklens.toolbar_editor.title: Toolbar Editor
skyblocklens.toolbar_editor.hint: Drag the toolbar to move it; pull the corner to resize the search field.
skyblocklens.nameplates.alias.title: Own Name Replacement
skyblocklens.nameplates.alias.desc: This text is local-only and is never sent to the server.
skyblocklens.api.disabled_note: No network requests are made in the MVP
skyblocklens.security.no_network: Network access is disabled by default
skyblocklens.security.no_automation: Automation and cheat-like features are forbidden
skyblocklens.profile.title: Profile Viewer
skyblocklens.profile.skeleton: Profile API support will be opt-in later
